headline: Viking Age
description: Viking Age (793-1066 CE): Norse seafarers from Scandinavia raided, traded, and settled across Europe, reaching North America (L'Anse aux Meadows, Newfoundland, ~1000 CE) centuries before Columbus. Not just raiders: also traders, explorers, settlers. Norse mythology (Odin, Thor, Valhalla) remains culturally influential.

citation.name: The Age of the Vikings (Anders Winroth)
The Viking Age: A Very Short Introduction (2025)
citation.author: multiple
